steps: Edit Profile → change Name and Username to your current name (the username can change once every 14 days).
Profile → Tags: remove yourself from posts that show your former name.
For posts by other people that name you, message the poster to ask for an edit, or report content that targets you.
If your Facebook is linked, repeat on Facebook: Settings → Name.
deadnameRemoval.limits: You control your own profile and tags, not other people's captions. An old username can still appear in others' screenshots or cached pages.
deadnameRemoval.escalation: Report harassment or impersonation through Meta's reporting flow if someone keeps using your former name.

steps: Settings → Privacy: set the account to private if you want to limit who sees your posts.
Review login activity and remove old devices and sessions.
Search your former name and old handles to find forgotten linked or tagged content.
